entries.title: Luke More Composed, Not a Jedi Master

context.label: Episode VI: Return of the Jedi

content.fact: By ROTJ, Luke is more composed and capable, but his final Jedi test and confrontation with Vader remain unresolved.
content.injection: Write ROTJ Luke as markedly more disciplined than ESB Luke, but do not overstate him as an old-order Master. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
